rationale: Cricket auction is a high-energy, high-stakes sports event. Archetype 2 provides a command-center focus with high-visibility tactical aesthetics using deep obsidian, pure white, and volt/electric accents suitable for intense data tracking and live bidding.

sizes.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter uppercase font-black
sizes.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight uppercase font-bold

layout_and_spacing.card_style: cardless or flat background (bg-[#141414]), sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), 1px solid stroke (border-white/10), no soft shadows
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Sticky top nav with crystal glass effect (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10) containing logo and primary navigation.

components.buttons: Tactical style, solid colors for primary CTA (bg-[#007AFF] text-white), transparent with 1px border for secondary. Active/Hover states get lighter hue. MUST have data-testid. Font: Barlow Condensed uppercase.
components.inputs: Shadcn custom. bg-[#0A0A0A] border-white/10 focus:border-[#007AFF] text-white. No soft shadows. Sharp corners.
components.tables: Dense, cardless data tables. 1px bottom border per row (border-white/10). Hover effect on rows (bg-white/5).
components.modals: Backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-xl). Dark tactical modal window (bg-[#141414] border border-white/10). No rounded corners.
components.team_cards: Bento grid item. Dense layout. Display budget remaining with prominent Volt Blue or Success Green typography. Show slots filled vs total slots clearly.
components.player_card: Highlight card during live bidding. Large photo placeholder, massive Barlow Condensed name, clear role badge (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, All-rounder, Wicketkeeper).
components.badges: Sharp rectangular badges for roles. e.g., bg-[#1F1F1F] text-white border border-white/20 uppercase text-xs tracking-wider.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white). Focus states must have higher contrast and clear focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#007AFF]).
motion_and_interaction.bidding_animations: When a player is sold, flash row/card with accent_success. When unsold, use accent_danger.

image_urls.description: Packed stadium during a thrilling night cricket match. Use for login/registration empty states with an overlay.
Abstract sports team logo with neon red and blue shapes.
Abstract colorful angular design for team logo.
Cricket player in white uniform playing a shot.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for standard text against #0A0A0A and #141414. Do not use generic gray.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements (buttons, inputs, clickable cards, budget displays) MUST include a kebab-case role-based data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme 'Performance Pro' archetype. No standard white dashboard styling.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for sharp, technical iconography.
Use Google Fonts: Barlow Condensed (Headings) and DM Sans (Body).
Setup routing: 1. Configuration (Setup teams, purse, slots) -> 2. Registration (Add team logos/names) -> 3. Player Entry -> 4. Live Auction / Dashboard.
For the Live Dashboard, implement a bento grid ('Control Room' mode). Track budget and slots dynamically, preventing transaction if team exceeds slots/credits.
Implement 'ExcelJS' for generating multi-sheet exports directly from the dashboard: Sheet 1 (Summary), Sheet 2 (Master List), Sheets 3+ (Individual teams).
Customize Shadcn components heavily to match the tactical dark theme (flat, border-white/10, sharp corners). DO NOT use default Shadcn rounded cards.
Ensure all interactive components have appropriate hover states and data-testid attributes for testing.
